summary: The notebook currently holds two notes: a course note on gradient descent fundamentals and a reading note on the Transformer paper.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: Covers gradient descent: the update rule, a one-step quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: No notes yet on momentum, Adam, second-order methods, or convergence theory.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: Covers the Transformer architecture: self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT BLEU results.
areas.gap: No notes on later Transformer variants, sub-quadratic attention, or positional-encoding advances.
